code.description: The unique, non-sequential redemption code printed on the bottle. e.g., WHKY-A7B3-9P4K-L2M1

pointsValue.description: How many loyalty points this code is worth.

status.description: The current state of the code. Can be 'available', 'redeemed', 'expired'.

redeemedAt.description: Timestamp of when the code was successfully redeemed.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiry date for the redemption code.
